title: Executive Order on College Sports System Governance and Student-Athlete Opportunities
summary: This executive order addresses the structure and operations of collegiate athletic programs in the United States. The order establishes policies intended to preserve scholarship opportunities and educational, athletic, and leadership development programs within college sports. The order recognizes college sports as a component of American educational institutions and national culture, and outlines federal directives regarding the governance framework for these programs.

title: Memorandum Regarding Department of Homeland Security Operations Following Extended Funding Lapse
summary: A presidential memorandum addressed to the Secretary of Homeland Security and the Director of the Office of Management and Budget regarding the operational status and resumption of normal functions at the Department of Homeland Security following an extended period without appropriated funding. The memorandum addresses measures to restore full operational capacity and staffing levels at the department.

title: Executive Order on Federal Contractor Compliance with Discrimination Prohibitions
summary: This executive order directs federal contractors to comply with existing laws prohibiting discrimination in employment and contracting. The order is issued under the authority of the Federal Property and Administrative Services Act and addresses how federal contractors implement diversity, equity, and inclusion practices in relation to non-discrimination requirements. The order establishes policies and procedures for federal contractors regarding employment practices and contractor selection processes.

title: Continuation of the Federal Emergency Management Agency Review Council
summary: Executive order authorizing the continued operation of the Federal Emergency Management Agency Review Council under the authority granted to the President by the Constitution and federal law, specifically in accordance with the Federal Advisory Committee Act provisions outlined in chapter 10 of title 5, United States Code. The order extends the council's mandate to continue its advisory functions.

title: Presidential Proclamation Designating Greek Independence Day as a National Day of Celebration of Greek and American Democracy
summary: This presidential proclamation commemorates Greek Independence Day and acknowledges the historical significance of Greek civilization and its contributions to democratic principles. The proclamation recognizes the Greek struggle for independence and emphasizes connections between Greek and American democratic traditions and values.

title: Presidential Proclamation Designating National Agriculture Day 2026
summary: This presidential proclamation designates a specific day in 2026 as National Agriculture Day. The proclamation acknowledges the historical contributions of farmers, ranchers, and growers to the United States and their roles in food production, economic activity, and resource management. The proclamation honors the agricultural community and their ongoing work in sustaining the nation's food and agricultural systems.
